title: First-guess command residuals
description:
Remove the remaining commands and flags that fail on the natural first guess.

## Background

Several first guesses fail today: `gate define` exposes the mode only as `-m/--mode` with no `--auto` convenience (cli.rs:885-887); `doc add` has `--label`/`--doc-type` but no `--title`, while the canonical human-label flag is `--label` (cli.rs:1175,1179); gate inspection misparses when the gate key and issue id are transposed; and the top-level command set has no reverse-deps or issue-listing entry (cli.rs:39-145).

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-05: gate define --auto sets mode to auto; doc add --title is accepted as an alias for the human label; a gate-inspection call with the gate key and issue id transposed yields an actionable suggestion rather than a misparse; and a top-level reverse-dependency or issue-listing first guess resolves to the canonical command or an actionable error.

## Notes

Touch cli.rs (gate define, doc add, the gate Check variant, top-level Commands) and the affected handlers. `--auto` sets mode=auto; `--title` on `doc add` aliases the `--label` human label; transposed gate-inspection args yield a did-you-mean; the reverse-deps / issue-listing guess resolves to the canonical command or an actionable error.
